title: CSS Borders
content:
### CSS Borders

**Border** draws a line around an element, between padding and margin.

---

### Border Width

```css
border-width: 2px;
border-width: thin;   /* 1px */
border-width: medium; /* 3px */
border-width: thick;  /* 5px */
border-width: 2px 5px; /* Per side shorthand */
```

---

### Border Style

**Required** for border to show:

```css
border-style: solid;    /* Solid line */
border-style: dashed;   /* Dashed line */
border-style: dotted;   /* Dotted line */
border-style: double;   /* Double line */
border-style: groove;   /* 3D groove */
border-style: ridge;    /* 3D ridge */
border-style: inset;    /* 3D inset */
border-style: outset;   /* 3D outset */
border-style: none;     /* No border */
border-style: hidden;   /* Same as none for tables */
```

---

### Border Color

```css
border-color: red;
border-color: #333;
border-color: transparent;
```

---

### Individual Sides

```css
border-top: 2px solid red;
border-right: 3px dashed blue;
border-bottom: 4px dotted green;
border-left: 5px double orange;
```

---

### Shorthand

```css
/* width style color */
border: 2px solid #333;

/* Side-specific shorthand */
border-top: 1px solid black;
```

---

### Collapse (Tables)

```css
table {
  border-collapse: collapse; /* Single borders */
  border-collapse: separate; /* Default */
}
```

---

### Border vs Outline

| Border | Outline |
|--------|---------|
| Part of box model | Not part of box model |
| Affects element size | Does not affect size |
| Can set per side | Always all sides |
| Can be styled individually | Uniform style |
| Renders inside margin | Renders outside border |

> **Key Point:** `border-style` is required. Without it, border won't render regardless of width and color.
codeExample:
Solid border
Dashed border
Dotted border
Double border
Left border only

quiz.question: Which border property is REQUIRED for a border to show?
